creator: ernst@heinz.jollem.com
text:
The Apache Xerces-J port is named "xerces" and can primarly be found in the
"textproc" category. Since there are 2 versions of Apache Xerces libraries
(one for C++ and one for Java), the name of this port should be made more
specific. The name suggested and used by Apache for the Java version of this
library is "xerces-j", so I suggest renaming this port from "textproc/xerces"
to "textproc/xerces-j".
